_note: Single source of truth for the portfolio. Carries over to the Astro content collection in Phase 2. Copy is in English (international audience). Keep `order` ascending; `featured` projects render as full sections, others as cards.

profile.name: Vagner Bessa
profile.headline: Full-stack & AI Engineer
profile.tagline: I design and ship production-grade AI products and web platforms — Python & TypeScript.
profile.availability: Open to international freelance projects and roles

projects.name: Agente Clínicas
projects.tagline: AI-powered WhatsApp service for medical clinics
projects.summary: A production-grade monolith that automates patient communication for clinics over WhatsApp: scheduling, triage, emergency detection and clinic management, with full LGPD (Brazilian GDPR) compliance.
highlights: Multiple specialized AI agents (assistant, triage, scheduler, emergency)
Full WhatsApp Business integration with multi-instance support
LGPD compliance with audit logging and PII redaction
Resilience: retry with backoff, circuit breakers, rate-limit bypass for emergencies
Full observability stack and multi-clinic data isolation
Role-based React admin dashboard (clinics, patients, doctors, appointments)

projects.name: FinRePAI · BitGov
projects.tagline: AI credit-risk evaluation for public-sector suppliers
projects.summary: An AI platform that evaluates the financial risk of Brazilian public-sector suppliers. Continuation of FINAI-BitGov, developed at IFCE's Innovation Hub in partnership with Bitgov — multi-agent data extraction, supplier rating and explainable analytics.
highlights: Adaptive multi-agent extraction from public transparency portals (200+ sources, scalable to 5,500 municipalities)
SiRaC — supplier rating system (4 dimensions, exponential smoothing, survival models)
MoBaVE — backtesting and empirical validation module
RExAn — explainable analytical reports generated via LLMs
Fuzzy matching to link payments to contracts; ML prediction of manager evaluations

projects.name: Expense Tracker AI
projects.tagline: Conversational personal finance, powered by AI agents
projects.summary: A modern, AI-powered personal finance app: manage transactions, budgets, accounts and goals, create entries in natural language, and get AI-driven insights and spending forecasts.
highlights: Natural-language transaction input ("I spent $50 on groceries")
AI-powered insights, smart categorization and balance projections
Budgets, accounts, goals and installment tracking with visual dashboards
Demo mode — explore with generated data, no backend required
Mobile-first responsive UI with light/dark/custom themes

projects.name: Weberist
projects.summary: A flexible web automation and scraping framework on top of Selenium, with out-of-the-box stealth that passes major bot-detection systems and first-class Docker support.
highlights: Stealth Chrome driver passing BotD, pixelscan and device/browser fingerprint tests
Chrome & Firefox support, profile and local-storage management
Dockerized headless execution
Customizable user agents and window sizes

projects.name: Aigents
projects.summary: A Python library of adapters for Large Language Models and GPT-style APIs, used to build chatbots and contextual bots with a consistent interface.
highlights: Simple async API for building chatbots
Adapters across multiple LLM providers
Highly customizable and extensible

projects.name: RHIA
projects.tagline: AI-assisted HR platform — technical lead & coordination
projects.summary: An EMBRAPII/IFCE initiative in partnership with Jubilato: an AI-assisted human-resources platform. Role focused on technical leadership, architecture and coordination across backend, frontend and modeling teams.
highlights: Technical coordination across backend / frontend / modeling repositories
AI-document and reporting conventions for the team
Multi-tenant and LGPD-aware architecture

projects.name: Rumo ao Zero
projects.tagline: Full-stack health app with a WhatsApp bot
projects.summary: A simultaneous alcohol-and-tobacco cessation app: Django API + Svelte SPA + a WhatsApp bot, tracking daily logs, cravings, slips and metrics.
highlights: Django REST backend + Svelte single-page app
WhatsApp bot for daily check-ins (logs, cravings, slips, pulse)
Metrics and progress tracking

projects.name: Sample Chat
projects.summary: A small live demonstration of real-time communication between users over WebSockets, built with Python and aiohttp.
highlights: Asynchronous WebSocket server with aiohttp
Responsive UI with Tailwind CSS
One-click Docker deployment

projects.name: Meta Agent
projects.tagline: An AI that builds AI agents
projects.summary: A meta-agent system that creates custom Mastra-based AI agents from natural language — researching best practices, interviewing for requirements, designing a plan and generating the implementation.
highlights: Researches, interviews, designs and generates Mastra agents
Structured plan generation in JSON
Agent mock system for fast, zero-cost testing
